originalTitle: The Complete Calvin and Hobbes is a great last-minute Father’s Day gift
summary: Father’s Day is nearly here. Hopefully, you already got a gift for dads you care about, but if not, here’s a quick, easy recommendation for anyone who enjoys a good comic strip. The Complete Calvin and Hobbes contains every one of Bill Watterson’s beloved strips made during the comic’s ten-year run from 1985 through 1995, […]
content: Father’s Day is nearly here. Hopefully, you already got a gift for dads you care about, but if not, here’s a quick, easy recommendation for anyone who enjoys a good comic strip. The Complete Calvin and Hobbes contains every one of Bill Watterson’s beloved strips made during the comic’s ten-year run from 1985 through 1995, packed in three deluxe hardcover books, for $89.48 at Amazon when you check the on-page coupon. The set originally sold for $225, but it’s often available for around $130. This is the best price I’ve seen it sell for. [Product: The Complete Calvin and Hobbes | https://www.amazon.com/dp/0740748475?tag=theverge02-20, https://goto.target.com/c/482924/81938/2092?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.target.com%2Fp%2Fthe-complete-calvin-and-hobbes-by-bill-watterson%2F-%2FA-87796727] The lighthearted, kid-friendly comics couldn’t be more different from Watterson’s darker, adult-themed The Mysteries, which brought him out of retirement with its 2023 launch. [Image: In addition to having illustrations, The Lord of the Rings includes a map of Middle-earth and other extras. https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/lotrdeluxe.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] If you’re thinking of getting dad a book, but aren’t sure Calvin and Hobbes is the right pick, there are some good deals happening on gorgeous hardcover versions of The Lord of the Rings and other tales in the franchise. The deluxe slipcase hardcover version of The Lord of the Rings that includes illustrations by the author J.R.R. Tolkien himself is $105.14 at Amazon, its lowest price in about a year. He can go further back in the lore with Silmarillion, the prequel to The Hobbit and to The Lord of the Rings. It, too, is illustrated, comes in a bold hardcover, and is down to its lowest price in a while. The book costs $30.50 at Amazon, while the slipcase hardcover version of The Hobbit that contains illustrations is $81.41.
chineseTitle: 《加尔文与霍布斯全集》是一份很棒的最后一刻父亲节礼物
chineseSummary: 父亲节快到了。希望您已经为自己关心的爸爸们准备了一份礼物，但如果还没有，这里有一个快速、简单的推荐给所有喜欢漫画的人。 《加尔文与霍布斯全集》包含了比尔·沃特森 (Bill Watterson) 在该漫画 1985 年至 1995 年十年间创作的所有漫画作品，[...]
chineseContent: 父亲节快到了。希望您已经为自己关心的爸爸们准备了一份礼物，但如果还没有，这里有一个快速、简单的推荐给所有喜欢漫画的人。 《加尔文与霍布斯全集》收录了比尔·沃特森 (Bill Watterson) 在该漫画从 1985 年到 1995 年十年间制作的所有连环漫画，装在三本豪华精装书中，在亚马逊上查看页面优惠券时售价为 89.48 美元。该套装最初售价为 225 美元，但通常售价约为 130 美元。这是我见过的最好的售价。 [产品：完整的加尔文和霍布斯 | https://www.amazon.com/dp/0740748475?tag=theverge02-20， https://goto.target.com/c/482924/81938/2092?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.target.com%2Fp%2Fthe-complete-calvin-and-hobbes-by-bill-watterson%2F-%2FA-87796727] 这部轻松、适合儿童的漫画与沃特森的黑暗、成人主题的漫画截然不同《The Mysteries》于 2023 年推出，让他摆脱了退休生活。 [图片：除了插图之外，《指环王》还包括中土世界地图和其他额外内容。 https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/lotrdeluxe.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] 如果您正在考虑给爸爸买一本书，但不确定《卡尔文和霍布斯》是正确的选择，那么《指环王》和该系列中其他故事的精美精装版有一些不错的优惠。 《指环王》的豪华书套精装版，包含作者 J.R.R. 的插图。托尔金本人在亚马逊的售价为 105.14 美元，这是一年来的最低价格。他可以追溯到《精灵宝钻》的传说中，《精灵宝钻》是《霍比特人》和《指环王》的前传。它也配有插图，采用大胆的精装本，并且价格降至一段时间内的最低价格。博
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
